description: Zero-auth research MCP: web, academic, finance, news, weather, macro, social, SEC. No keys.
name: io.github.olanokhin/openresearch-mcp

environmentVariables.description: GitHub token — increases rate limit from 60 to 5,000 req/hr
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Your email for the OpenAlex polite pool (higher rate limits)
environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Stack Exchange API key for higher daily quota on Stack Overflow searches
environmentVariables.name: STACKEXCHANGE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your contact email/string for SEC EDGAR fair-access; a default is used otherwise
environmentVariables.name: SEC_USER_AGENT

title: OpenResearch MCP
